    def open_city_input(self, field):
    
        for i in range(3):
    
            try:
    
                city_box = self.wait.until(
                    EC.element_to_be_clickable(field)
                )
    
                self.driver.execute_script(
                    "arguments[0].click();",
                    city_box
                )
    
                time.sleep(2)
    
                active_input = self.wait.until(
                    EC.visibility_of_element_located(
                        (
                            By.XPATH,
                            "//input[@type='text']"
                        )
                    )
                )
    
                return active_input
    
            except:
    
                logger.info("RETRYING CITY BOX CLICK")
    
                time.sleep(2)
